title: Witness Council DAO (local ops)
author: guardian@vaultmesh.org
summary: Local ops governance shell: proposals, vote receipts, audit chaining, and execution permits that terminate at controlled lane workflows. v1 gates only akalynth-lane-deploy.sh check — zero runtime auto-mutation.

lineage.origin: AKALYNTH_COUNCIL_DAO_V1 packet seed — post chill-zone showcase closure
lineage.last_accepted_change: codex seed: schemas + design packet authored 2026-06-21

world.description: Operator-layer Witness Council. Not the in-fiction Accord Council (see systems-bible). This object models how Akalynth ops proposals become receipt-backed permits before any lane action. v1 action classes are read-only lane check only.

related.note: Lore-adjacent witness/evidence motif; ops council is operator machinery, not the creature.
In-fiction Accord Council and governance pillars are separate from this ops shell.
